title: Meal Plan Agent
description: Turns a fridge photo into a meal plan, shopping list, and localized budget estimate with local multimodal agents.

title: Paper2Impl Agent
description: Implements research papers and produces an experiment plan, common pitfalls, and starter commands with local LLMs.

title: MARL Swarm Evasion
description: Trains target and interceptor satellite swarms in a cooperative-competitive orbital environment using reinforcement learning and physics simulation.

title: Agents Talk
description: Runs two local Ollama agents with a moderator and critic to drive adversarial or constructive conversations toward a concrete result.

title: PaperFeed Daily Digest
description: Builds a small daily paper digest from seed papers and publishes a static reading website for literature review.

title: Time-Series Anomaly Detection
description: Notebook-based experiments around maneuver detection on time-series data.

title: N2D Clustering
description: High-dimensional clustering experiments using the N2D architecture.

title: Speckle Denoising
description: Implements several deep learning architectures for ultrasound speckle-noise removal on the Kaggle nerve segmentation dataset.

title: Arduino Buoy IMU
description: Modular buoy framework using an Arduino Nano and MPU9250 IMU for swell measurement, motion analysis, and sensor-data processing.

title: Algorithmic Trading
description: Backtesting environment for crypto trading strategies with grid search, visualization, and risk-management controls.

title: Aircraft Simulator (1:1 scale)
description: Built a full-scale aircraft simulator in a Beechcraft Baron 55 cockpit, covering fundraising, electronics, and 3D-printed instruments for the student team.
